description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
What's Changed
- fix(koplugin): fix typo of saveSetting, closes #1788 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1789
- fix(koplugin): add expected 301 status code by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1791
- css: background color for dialogs and images, closes #1797 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1798
- fix: adjust snap threshold to avoid pagination changes when toggling toolbars, closes #1807 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1811
- Update translation.json by @StepanSad in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1826
- chore(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 in the github-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1827
- tts: fix edge tts, closes #1821 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1828
- layout: fix options list align right on Windows by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1829
- fix(sync): support custom koreader sync server hosted in LAN, closes #1800 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1830
- release: version 0.9.72 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1831
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.71...v0.9.72
